overview.description: The Corgi 0-3 Month T-Bill ETF (CGOV) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the FTSE US Treasury Bill 0-3 Months index. The fund tracks a market value-weighted index of US Treasury bills with maturities between zero and three months. CGOV was launched on Jun 4, 2026 and is issued by Corgi.
infoTable: FTSE US Treasury Bill 0-3 Months Index
